quote: He is persistent and bold, I could name multiple initiatives where he did great and managed achieve results not every EM could do.
He is easy to understand, talk to, is highly emotionally intelligent and able to move on his own like nobody else.

Gerrit is an excellent Engineering Manager. I admire his ability to be kind, respectful, and caring, while still being able to make unpopular decisions and stand by them. He is a true leader who provides guidance when needed but trusts us with the space for self-management. I always feel heard and that my opinion matters, even when he disagrees.
